description: Address review feedback: fix stats card inconsistency, add search debounce, extract shared DateRangePickerWithPresets component.
steps: Fix stats card inconsistency on bill statements page: change Total Statements to show filteredBillStatements.length, with a secondary line showing 'of {billStatements.length} total' when filters are active.
Add debounced search in bill-statements-filters.tsx: introduce a debouncedSearch state with a 200ms setTimeout useEffect, and use debouncedSearch in the filtering useEffect instead of search.

Extract a shared DateRangePickerWithPresets component at src/components/ui/date-range-picker.tsx with props: dateRange, onDateRangeChange, triggerClassName, align. Replace inline date picker code in both expenses-filters.tsx and bill-statements-filters.tsx with this component.
acceptance_criteria: Total Statements card shows filtered count and shows 'of X total' when filters are active
Bill statements search input is debounced at 200ms
A DateRangePickerWithPresets component exists at src/components/ui/date-range-picker.tsx
Both expenses-filters.tsx and bill-statements-filters.tsx use the extracted component
verification: Run pnpm build to confirm the project compiles successfully
Run pnpm lint to confirm no linting errors
findings: All three review items addressed. Build and lint pass cleanly (only pre-existing warnings remain). The date-range-picker.tsx component reduces code duplication by ~180 lines across the two filter files.
